# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch snapshot configuration

# Define snapshot repository
repositories:
  s3:
    type: s3
    settings:
      bucket: <s3_bucket_name>
      region: <s3_region>
      access_key: <s3_access_key>
      secret_key: <s3_secret_key>

# Schedule snapshot creation
cron:
  interval: "0 0 * * *" # Run daily at midnight

# Define snapshot alias
snapshot_alias:
  name: daily-snapshot
  repository: s3

# Create and restore snapshots
snapshot:
  create:
    index: "*"
    repository: s3
    alias: daily-snapshot
  restore:
    index: "*"
    repository: s3
    alias: daily-snapshot
